meanings: Short form of   Ronald .  It is sometimes used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Ronald
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Rögnvaldr (composed of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’). This name was regularly used in the Middle Ages in northern England and Scotland, where Scandinavian influence was strong. It is now widespread throughout the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheim was born about 1450, in Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Württemberg, Germany. He had at least 2 sons. He died about 1495, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

de.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheim wurde um 1450 in Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Kreis Böblingen, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1495 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ja.Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Würt: ドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンダルムシェイム
ja.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheimは約1450年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブoブリンジェンシンデルフィンジェンダルムシェイムで生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1495年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.Darmsheim, Sindelfingen, Böblingen, Würt: 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐 더셰임
ko.lifeSummary: Hans von Darmsheim(은)는 대략 1450년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브o블링 신델핀겐 더셰임에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1495년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.
